title: VERONICA: A Runtime Containment Layer for Compositional Resource Amplification in LLM Agent Systems
description: LLM agent frameworks expose runaway failure modes -- retry amplification, recursive tool loops, multi-agent cost cascades, and WebSocket session runaways -- that arise from individually reasonable local decisions composing into unbounded global resource consumption. VERONICA enforces chain-level resource bounds through four orthogonal primitives (BudgetEnforcer, AgentStepGuard, CircuitBreaker, RetryContainer) unified under a RuntimePolicy protocol. We present six formal safety guarantees (G1-G6), benchmark results showing 53-90% operation reduction versus uncontained baselines, and a policy pipeline overhead of 11.43 microseconds per call.
notes: Working paper. Open-source implementation available as veronica-core on PyPI (v3.4.2, 4844 tests, 94% coverage).
